metadata.description: Supported scraper configuration for government websites. Add new websites here with selectors and parser details when they are ready to crawl.

selector_contract.item_selector: CSS selector for each repeatable card, row, or link
selector_contract.title_selector: Optional child selector for the title text
selector_contract.link_selector: Optional child selector for the anchor element
selector_contract.summary_selector: Optional child selector for description text
selector_contract.date_selector: Optional child selector for publish date text
selector_contract.row_selector: Table row selector when parser_type = table
selector_contract.wait_for_selector: Optional selector to wait for before capturing rendered HTML
selector_contract.parser_backend: Use bs4 for simple HTML pages or scrapy for selector-heavy pages
